title: Stay Alert
description: Always be aware of your surroundings.

title: Share Location
description: Share live location with trusted contacts.

title: Emergency Contact
description: Keep emergency numbers on speed dial.

title: Trust Your Instincts
description: If something feels wrong, leave immediately.

title: Avoid Strangers
description: Do not share personal info with unknown people.

title: Stay Connected
description: Keep someone informed about your route.

title: Avoid Distractions
description: Do not use phone while walking in unsafe areas.

title: Keep SOS Ready
description: Always have emergency SOS app ready.

title: No Oversharing
description: Avoid posting live location on social media.

title: Avoid Alcohol Alone
description: Do not consume alcohol alone in unknown places.

title: Secure Bags
description: Keep bags close in crowded areas.

title: Watch Exits
description: Always know emergency exits in buildings.

title: Emergency Code
description: Set a safety code word with family.

title: Fake Call Trick
description: Use fake calls to avoid unsafe situations.

title: Safe Waiting
description: Wait inside shops or safe places.

title: Stay Near Crowd
description: Always stay near groups of people.

title: Use Headphones Safely
description: Keep volume low to stay alert.

title: Know Safe Spots
description: Identify safe places in your area.

title: Avoid Unknown Lifts
description: Do not accept rides from strangers.

title: Practice Escape Plan
description: Know how to react in danger.

title: Know Police Station
description: Be aware of nearby police stations.
